---
title: "About me"
---

<img src="images/_1255176_sw_compressed.png" style="width:35%; margin-right: 35px" align="left">

<br />
<br />

### `r fontawesome::fa("university")` &nbsp; M.Sc. in Data Science for Public Policy, 2021 -- 2023
#### &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Hertie School

### `r fontawesome::fa("university")` &nbsp; B.A. in Political Science, 2021 
#### &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; University of Bremen

<br />

##### Hi there! I'm a [Master's student in Data Science for Public Policy at the Hertie School](https://www.hertie-school.org/en/mds). I have a background and strong domain interest in Political Science, with several years of work experience in academia, including positions as a research assistant and tutor in Applied Statistics. My substantive research interest in Political and Social Sciences is accompanied by a general interest in data-driven approaches and Statistics. Therefore, I mainly use R with a focus on the tidyverse!

##### This website features several visualizations and analyses using data from the [ParlGov](https://parlgov.org/) project. [Check them out!](https://lwarode.github.io/pg_vis.html)

##### If you are interested in more recent projects and work of mine, check out my [GitHub](https://github.com/lwarode)!
